member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults
member.summary: Default configuration values for the Core Platform API application. Centralizes magic numbers and fallback values.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Database
member.summary: Database configuration constants.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Database.ConfigurationKey
member.summary: Configuration key for database connection string lookup.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Database.ConnectionTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Database connection timeout in seconds.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication
member.summary: JWT authentication configuration constants.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.IssuerConfigKey
member.summary: Configuration key for JWT issuer.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.AudienceConfigKey
member.summary: Configuration key for JWT audience.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.SigningKeyConfigKey
member.summary: Configuration key for JWT signing key.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.JwtSecretEnvironmentVariable
member.summary: Environment variable name for JWT secret.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.DefaultIssuer
member.summary: Default JWT issuer.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.DefaultAudience
member.summary: Default JWT audience.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.DevelopmentSecret
member.summary: Development JWT secret (only used in development).

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.ParticipantIdClaim
member.summary: Participant ID claim name.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Authentication.ClockSkew
member.summary: JWT clock skew tolerance.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.HealthChecks
member.summary: Health check configuration constants.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.HealthChecks.SelfCheckName
member.summary: Self health check name.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.HealthChecks.EndpointPath
member.summary: Health check endpoint path.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Application
member.summary: Application-wide constants.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.CorePlatformDefaults.Application.Name
member.summary: Application display name.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.MinioOptions
member.summary: Strongly-typed options for the MinIO object storage client.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.MinioOptions.Endpoint
member.summary: MinIO server endpoint (host:port).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.MinioOptions.AccessKey
member.summary: MinIO access key (username).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.MinioOptions.SecretKey
member.summary: MinIO secret key (password).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Configuration.MinioOptions.UseSsl
member.summary: Whether to use SSL for MinIO connections.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.ActionTypesController
member.summary: Controller for querying the action type catalog.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.ActionTypesController.GetActionTypes
member.returns: The ordered list of available action types.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing amendments related to a specific idea.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.#ctor(Wolverine.IMessageBus,BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.IPseudonymService)
member.summary: Provides endpoints for managing amendments related to a specific idea.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.ProposeAmendment(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.ProposeAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Proposes a new amendment for an idea.
member.param: The ID of the idea to propose an amendment for.
The request containing the proposed title and body for the amendment.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A created response with the ID of the proposed amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.GetAmendments(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.AmendmentsQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all amendments for a specific idea.
member.param: The ID of the idea to retrieve amendments for.
The pagination query specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated response of amendments for the specified idea.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.GetAmendment(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific amendment by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to retrieve.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The amendment details if found; otherwise, a 404 Not Found response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.GetAmendmentSupporters(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets supporters for a specific amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to get supporters for.
The pagination query specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated response of supporters for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.GetAmendmentOpponents(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets opponents for a specific amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to get opponents for.
The pagination query specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated response of opponents for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.GetAmendmentTrend(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets support trend data for a specific amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to get trend data for.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The support trend data for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.SupportAmendment(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.SupportAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds support for an amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to support.
The request containing the reason for supporting the amendment.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.OpposeAmendment(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.OpposeAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds opposition to an amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to oppose.
The request containing the reason for opposing the amendment.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.WithdrawSupport(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.WithdrawSupportRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraws support for an amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to withdraw support from.
The request for withdrawing support (no additional data required).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.AmendmentsController.WithdrawOpposition(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.WithdrawOppositionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraws opposition to an amendment.
member.param: The ID of the amendment to withdraw opposition from.
The request for withdrawing opposition (no additional data required).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController
member.summary: Controller for managing community discourse around entities.
member.param: The mediator for dispatching commands and queries.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController.#ctor(Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Controller for managing community discourse around entities.
member.param: The mediator for dispatching commands and queries.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController.GetContributions(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets root contributions for a specific entity with cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The ID of the thread to get contributions for.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of contributions to return (default: 5).
Direction of pagination (forward or backward).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The root contributions for the entity with cursor pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController.GetReplies(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets replies for a specific contribution with cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The ID of the contribution to get replies for.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of replies to return (default: 5).
Direction of pagination (forward or backward).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The replies for the contribution with cursor pagination.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController.PostContribution(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.PostContributionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Posts a new contribution to the discourse thread for an entity.
member.param: The ID of the entity.
The contribution posting request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created contribution.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DiscourseController.GetContributionsByEntity(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets root contributions for a specific entity with cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The type of the entity for which the discourse thread is being retrieved. Cannot be null or whitespace.
The unique identifier of the entity for which the discourse thread is being retrieved. Cannot be null or whitespace.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of contributions to return (default: 5).
Direction of pagination (forward or backward).
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing an with the retrieved if found, or a 404 response if no thread is associated with the specified entity.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController
member.summary: Controller for managing documents in the Core Platform API.
member.param: The document management service.
The logger instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.#ctor(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController})
member.summary: Controller for managing documents in the Core Platform API.
member.param: The document management service.
The logger instance.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.StoreDocument(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores a document in the system.
member.param: The uploaded file containing the document content.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the stored document.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentMetadata(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves document metadata by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The document metadata.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.DownloadDocument(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a document by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The document content stream.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.DeleteDocument(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a document by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: No content on successful deletion.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Logs.LogDocumentUploadStarted(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Logs "Starting document upload for file: {FileName}, Size: {FileSize} bytes" at "Information" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Logs.LogDocumentStoredSuccessfully(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Document stored successfully with ID: {DocumentId}" at "Information" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.DocumentsController.Logs.LogDocumentFailedToStore(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to store document {FileName}" at "Error" level.

member.summary: Controller for managing ideas.
member.param: The message bus instance used for publishing events or messages.
The pseudonym service for resolving participant identities.

member.summary: Controller for managing ideas.
member.param: The message bus instance used for publishing events or messages.
The pseudonym service for resolving participant identities.

member.summary: Creates a new idea.
member.param: The idea creation request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The created idea.

member.summary: Gets a specific idea by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the idea to retrieve.
member.returns: A response containing the idea details.

member.summary: Gets all ideas.
member.param: The request parameters for filtering ideas.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A page of ideas.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController
member.summary: Endpoints for identity mapping and user trust.
member.param: Identity profile service.

member.summary: Endpoints for identity mapping and user trust.
member.param: Identity profile service.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.Link(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Links (or retrieves) the internal user id for a given external identity.
member.param: Link request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Link response containing the internal user id.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.GetUser(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets identity and trust info for a user.
member.param: Internal user id.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: User identity/trust view.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.SetPersonhood(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.PersonhoodRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets a user's personhood verified flag.
member.param: Internal user id.
Personhood request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Updated user identity/trust view.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkRequest
member.summary: Request to link an external identity to an internal user id.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkRequest.Provider
member.summary: The external identity provider (e.g., "google", "github").

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkRequest.Subject
member.summary: The subject identifier for the external identity (e.g., email, username).

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.PersonhoodRequest
member.summary: Request to set a user's personhood verification status.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.PersonhoodRequest.Verified
member.summary: Indicates whether the user's personhood has been verified.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkResponse
member.summary: Response containing the internal user id after linking an external identity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.LinkResponse.UserId
member.summary: The internal user id associated with the external identity.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.UserView
member.summary: View model for user identity and trust information.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.UserView.UserId
member.summary: The internal user id.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.UserView.PersonhoodVerified
member.summary: Indicates whether the user's personhood has been verified.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.IdentityController.UserView.TrustLevel
member.summary: The trust level of the user (e.g., "unknown", "trusted", "untrusted").

member.summary: Controller for managing signals.

member.summary: Controller for managing signals.

The pseudonym service for resolving participant identities.

member.summary: Gets a specific signal by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the signal to retrieve.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A signal view model containing details about the signal.

member.summary: Gets all signals.
member.param: The signals query.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A list of signals.

member.summary: Creates a new signal.
member.param: The signal creation request.
member.returns: The created signal.

member.summary: Amplifies a signal by a participant.
member.param: The ID of the signal to amplify.
The amplification request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated signal information.

member.summary: Adds evidence to a signal.
member.param: The unique identifier of the signal to add evidence to.
The evidence request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The if of the added evidence.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SignalsController.DeamplifySignal(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes an amplification from the specified signal.
member.param: The unique identifier of the signal to deamplify. Cannot be null, empty, or whitespace.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An containing the unique identifier of the deamplified signal if the operation is successful.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SignalsController.SuggestAction(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.SuggestActionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Suggests an action on a signal.
member.param: The ID of the signal to suggest an action on.
The action suggestion request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A 201 Created response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SignalsController.GetSignalAmplificationTrend(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets amplification trend data for a specific signal.
member.param: The ID of the signal to get trend data for.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The signal amplification trend data.

member.summary: Controller for managing societies.

The pseudonym service for resolving participant identities.

member.summary: Controller for managing societies.
member.param: The message bus for dispatching commands and queries.
The pseudonym service for resolving participant identities.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.CreateSociety(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSocietyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new society together with its initial social contract.
member.param: The society creation request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created society.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.GetSocieties(BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.SocietiesQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of societies with optional tag and geographic filtering.
member.param: The pagination and filter parameters.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated list of societies.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.GetSociety(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single society by ID.
member.param: The society ID.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The society, or 404 if not found.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.GetSocietyMembers(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.EmptyFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of active members for a society.
member.param: The society ID.
The pagination parameters.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated list of members.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.JoinSociety(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.JoinSocietyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Joins a society. The body must specify the social contract ID to agree to.
member.param: The society to join.
The join request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The new membership ID, or an error response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.GetMySocietyIds(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the IDs of all societies the authenticated participant is an active member of. Returns an empty array for unauthenticated requests.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of society ID strings.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.SocietiesController.LeaveSociety(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the current participant's active membership from a society.
member.param: The society to leave.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: 204 No Content on success.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.TagsController
member.summary: Controller for managing global tags.
member.param: The message bus instance used for publishing events or messages.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.TagsController.#ctor(Wolverine.IMessageBus)
member.summary: Controller for managing global tags.
member.param: The message bus instance used for publishing events or messages.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Controllers.TagsController.GetTags(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of globally popular tags.
member.param: The maximum number of tags to include in the response. Must be a positive integer.
A token that can be used to cancel the asynchronous operation.
member.returns: An array of popular tags.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.CorePlatformServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Dependency injection configuration for the Core Platform API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.CorePlatformServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCorePlatformServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment)
member.summary: Adds all Core Platform API services to the service collection in organized groups. This method orchestrates the registration of all services required by the Core Platform API.
member.param: The service collection to add services to.
The configuration instance.
The host environment instance.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.DocumentManagement.DocumentManagementServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Dependency injection configuration for document management services.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.DocumentManagement.DocumentManagementServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDocumentManagement(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds document management services to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection to add services to.
The configuration instance.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.DocumentManagement.MinioDocumentManagementService
member.summary: Provides an implementation of the IDocumentManagementService interface for managing documents using a MinIO-based storage backend. Supports asynchronous operations for storing, retrieving, and deleting documents.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.DocumentManagement.MinioDocumentManagementService.#ctor(Minio.IMinioClient)
member.summary: Instantiates a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Minio client.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.AggregateNotFoundExceptionHandler
member.summary: Handles and writes a 404 Not Found ProblemDetails response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.AggregateNotFoundExceptionHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IProblemDetailsService)
member.summary: Handles and writes a 404 Not Found ProblemDetails response.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.DomainExceptionHandler
member.summary: Handles (including and ) and writes a 422 Unprocessable Entity ProblemDetails response.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.DomainExceptionHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IProblemDetailsService)
member.summary: Handles (including and ) and writes a 422 Unprocessable Entity ProblemDetails response.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.UnhandledExceptionHandler
member.summary: Fallback handler that catches all unhandled exceptions and writes a 500 Internal Server Error ProblemDetails response. Must be registered last so that more specific handlers take priority.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.UnhandledExceptionHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IProblemDetailsService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandling.UnhandledExceptionHandler})
member.summary: Fallback handler that catches all unhandled exceptions and writes a 500 Internal Server Error ProblemDetails response. Must be registered last so that more specific handlers take priority.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.HttpContextParticipantExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for resolving participant identity from HttpContext in APIs.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.HttpContextParticipantExtensions.GetParticipantIdOrAnonymous(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Resolves the current participant id from claims, or returns ParticipantId.Anonymous.
member.param: The HttpContext.
member.returns: The ParticipantId if available; otherwise ParticipantId.Anonymous.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.IntegrationEventMapperRegistration
member.summary: Extension methods for registering integration event mappers in the service collection.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.IntegrationEventMapperRegistration.AddIntegrationEventMappers(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Registers integration event mappers from the specified assemblies into the service collection.
member.param: The service collection to add the mappers to.
The assemblies to scan for integration event mappers. If null or empty, the executing assembly is used.
member.returns: The updated service collection.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring WebApplicationBuilder services.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationBuilderExtensions.AddConfiguredControllers(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures controllers with JSON options, filters, and model binders.
member.param: The service collection.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationBuilderExtensions.AddConfiguredSwagger(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures Swagger/OpenAPI documentation with custom schema generation and filters.
member.param: The service collection.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationBuilderExtensions.AddConfiguredCors(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures CORS policies for the application.
member.param: The service collection.
The configuration instance.
member.returns: The service collection for method chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring the WebApplication pipeline.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions.ConfigureDevelopmentPipeline(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Configures the request pipeline for development environments.
member.param: The web application.
member.returns: The web application for method chaining.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions.ConfigureStandardPipeline(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Configures the standard middleware pipeline.
member.param: The web application.
member.returns: The web application for method chaining.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Extensions.WebApplicationExtensions.ConfigureEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Configures endpoint mapping.
member.param: The web application.
member.returns: The web application for method chaining.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.DevelopmentSeeder
member.summary: Runs development seed data against the Marten document store. Must be called after the host has fully started so that Wolverine is ready to receive events.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.DevelopmentSeeder.SeedAsync(System.IServiceProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Seeds development data into Marten. Each seeder is idempotent and skips if data already exists.
member.param: The application service provider.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.DocumentSeeder
member.summary: Seeds placeholder documents into MinIO for development use. Each document is stored using its logical ID as the MinIO object key so that document IDs in seed data can be resolved directly without a mapping step. Seeding is idempotent: existing objects are skipped.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.DocumentSeeder.SeedAsync(Minio.IMinioClient,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads any missing seed documents to MinIO.
member.param: The MinIO client.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.SeedDataLoader
member.summary: Loads shared seed data embedded in the CorePlatform.API assembly.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Infrastructure.Seeding.SeedDataLoader.LoadParticipants
member.summary: Loads the shared participant list from the embedded seed-participants.json resource.
member.returns: An ordered array of participant IDs matching the seed JSON.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Mappings.AmendmentMapper
member.summary: Pure structural mapping from amendment read models to API response contracts.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Mappings.AmendmentMapper.ToAmendmentsListItemResponse(BindingChaos.Ideation.Application.ReadModels.AmendmentsListItemView,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a to a .
member.param: The list-item read model to map.
The current participant, used to determine authorship and vote status.
The pre-resolved pseudonym for the amendment author.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Mappings.AmendmentMapper.ToAmendmentResponse(BindingChaos.Ideation.Application.ReadModels.AmendmentDetailView,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,System.String)
member.summary: Maps a to a using a pre-resolved pseudonym.
member.param: The amendment detail read model to map.
The current participant, used to determine authorship and vote status.
The pre-resolved pseudonym for the amendment creator.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Mappings.AmendmentMapper.ToAmendmentSupporterResponse(BindingChaos.Ideation.Application.ReadModels.AmendmentSupporterView,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Maps a single to an using pre-resolved pseudonyms.
member.param: The supporter to map.
Pre-resolved pseudonym map (userId → pseudonym) scoped to the idea.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.summary: Maps a single to an using pre-resolved pseudonyms.
member.param: The opponent to map.
Pre-resolved pseudonym map (userId → pseudonym) scoped to the idea.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.summary: Maps a to a .
member.param: The trend data to map.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.summary: Pure structural mapping from discourse read models to API response contracts.

member.summary: Maps a to a .
member.param: The read model to map.
The current request trace identifier.
Optional thread ID to include in the response.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.summary: Maps a to a .

member.summary: Maps a to a .
member.param: The idea read model to map.
The pre-resolved source signal titles for this idea.
The pseudonym for the idea's author.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.summary: Maps a to a using pre-resolved pseudonyms.
member.param: The signal read model to map.
The current participant, used to determine originator and amplification status.

The current participant, used to determine originator and amplification status.
The pre-resolved pseudonym for the signal originator.
member.returns: The mapped .

member.returns: The mapped .

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService
member.summary: Implementation-agnostic document management service interface. Provides comprehensive document operations following ECM standards.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService.StoreDocumentAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores a document in the system and returns a unique identifier.
member.param: The stream containing the document data.
The name of the document including extension.
The MIME type of the document.
The size of the document in bytes.
Id of the users that uploaded the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the stored document.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService.GetDocumentMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves document metadata by its identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Document metadata including file information and properties.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService.GetDocumentContentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the content stream of a document.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A stream containing the document content.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.API.Services.IDocumentManagementService.DeleteDocumentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a document from the system.
member.param: The unique identifier of the document to delete.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous delete operation.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Entry point — exposed as partial to allow WebApplicationFactory access in integration tests.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
member.returns: The normalized documentation comment ID.
